INSURANCE COMPLIANCE RULES (ENTERPRISE STANDARD)

RULE 1: Policy Number must be present and must follow valid format (e.g., LIC-XXXXXXX). Missing or invalid → FAIL.

RULE 2: Policy Type must be explicitly stated (Life, Health, Vehicle, Property). Missing → FAIL.

RULE 3: Policy Issuance Date must be present and in YYYY-MM-DD format. Missing or invalid → FAIL.

RULE 4: Policy Status must be present (Active / Inactive / Lapsed). Missing → FAIL.

RULE 5: Full Name of insured customer must be present. Missing → FAIL.

RULE 6: Date of Birth must be present and valid.

RULE 7: Full Address must be provided. Missing → FAIL.

RULE 8: Contact Number must be valid international format.

RULE 9: KYC Status must be explicitly VERIFIED or APPROVED. Anything else → FAIL.

RULE 10: Identity Document type must be mentioned (Passport, ID Card, etc.).

RULE 11: Coverage Amount must be numeric and greater than 0.

RULE 12: Premium Amount must be present and numeric.

RULE 13: Payment Mode must be specified (Monthly/Annual/etc.).

RULE 14: Nominee Name must be present.

RULE 15: Relationship to Nominee must be specified.

RULE 16: Declaration statement must be present.

RULE 17: Signature of insured must be present.

RULE 18: Date of Signature must match policy issuance date.

RULE 19: Authorized Insurance Officer signature must be present.

RULE 20: Company seal must be present.

RULE 21: Any missing mandatory field results in AUTOMATIC NON-COMPLIANCE.

RULE 22: Evidence must be explicitly extracted from document; no assumptions allowed.
